demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.title: General Manager
demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.description:
Key Responsibilities
Feature Development: Develop new user-facing features using React.js and modern JavaScript (ES6+).

Component Architecture: Build reusable, scalable, and highly cohesive components and front-end libraries for future use.

UI/UX Implementation: Translate designs, wireframes, and business requirements into high-quality code.

Performance Optimization: Optimize components for maximum performance across a vast array of web-capable devices and browsers.

State Management: Efficiently manage application state using [Redux / Context API / Zustand / MobX].

Collaboration: Work closely with backend developers to integrate RESTful APIs or GraphQL endpoints, and collaborate with QA to ensure bug-free releases.

Required Skills & Qualifications
Experience: [X]+ years of professional experience working with React.js.

Core Tech: Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3, including DOM manipulation and the JavaScript object model.

React Knowledge: Thorough understanding of React.js and its core principles (Hooks, component lifecycle, functional vs. class components).

Ecosystem: Experience with popular React workflows and state management libraries.

API Integration: Familiarity with RESTful APIs and modern authorization mechanisms (e.g., JWT).

Build Tools: Experience with modern front-end build pipelines and tooling (e.g., Vite, Webpack, Babel, npm/yarn).

Version Control: Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git.

Nice to Haves (Preferred Qualifications)
Experience with TypeScript.

Familiarity with server-side rendering (SSR) or static site generation (SSG) using frameworks like Next.js.

Experience with front-end testing tools (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress).

Knowledge of CSS-in-JS libraries (Styled Components, Emotion) or utility-first CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS).

demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.title: Cloud Engineer
demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.description: A Cloud Engineer is an IT professional responsible for designing, planning, implementing, and managing an organization's cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP). They maintain secure, scalable, and efficient cloud-based systems, handling tasks like cloud migration, monitoring, automation via scripting, and cost optimization.

demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.title: Backend Intern
demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.description: A Backend Engineer designs, builds, and maintains the server-side logic, databases, and APIs that power applications. They ensure high performance, scalability, and security while collaborating with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements. Key skills include proficiency in languages like Python, Java, or Go, plus SQL/NoSQL databases and cloud technologies.

demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.title: Senior Frontend Developer
demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.description: We are looking for a React expert to lead our dashboard team. Experience with TypeScript and Tailwind is a must.

demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.title: Backend Engineer (Python/FastAPI)
demo_jobs_00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000.description: Join our AI infrastructure team. You will be building scalable APIs using FastAPI and LangGraph.
